message:
feat: add http/net/worker_threads builtins and pre-deploy pipeline

Runtime builtins (Tier 2 JsRunner):
- http/https: Server, IncomingMessage, ServerResponse with createServer(),
  listen() → callback, _handleRequest() for DO fetch() routing
- net: Socket, Server with connect/write/end lifecycle, isIP/isIPv4/isIPv6
- worker_threads: Worker with postMessage, isMainThread, MessageChannel

Pre-deploy pipeline (src/deploy.ts, runs in Node.js):
- analyzeProject() scans for native addons, HTTP servers, worker_threads,
  streams, dynamic requires
- transformSource() auto-fixes: native addon swaps (bcrypt→bcryptjs, etc.),
  HTTP server .listen() port → 0 for DO routing
- deployProject() writes transformed output preserving directory structure
- NATIVE_ADDON_SWAPS map for 11 common native packages

Tests: 309 workers + 20 deploy = 329 total

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,10 @@
       "types": "./src/client.ts",
       "default": "./src/client.ts"
     },
+    "./deploy": {
+      "types": "./src/deploy.ts",
+      "default": "./src/deploy.ts"
+    },
     "./shims/fs": {
       "types": "./src/shims/fs.ts",
       "default": "./src/shims/fs.ts"
@@ -53,13 +57,16 @@
     "dev": "wrangler dev",
     "build": "tsc",
     "deploy": "wrangler deploy",
-    "test": "vitest run",
+    "test": "vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.node.config.ts",
+    "test:workers": "vitest run",
+    "test:deploy": "vitest run --config vitest.node.config.ts",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers": "^0.12.20",
     "@cloudflare/workers-types": "^4.20250301.0",
+    "@types/node": "^25.4.0",
     "typescript": "^5.7.0",
     "vitest": "^3.2.4",
     "wrangler": "^4.71.0"

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "target": "ES2022",
+    "module": "ESNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
+    "lib": ["ES2022"],
+    "types": ["node"],
+    "strict": true,
+    "noEmit": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "resolveJsonModule": true,
+    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true
+  },
+  "include": ["src/deploy.ts", "test/deploy.test.ts"]
+}
